title: Sign in successfully and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a user can authenticate with valid credentials and reach the authenticated dashboard view.

steps.description: Click the control to open the authentication screen
Verify the user lands on the authenticated dashboard

title: Session and personalization persist after hard reload
description: Verifies that after changing theme/currency the user can reload the SPA and remain signed in with preferences still applied.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Verify the user remains in the authenticated app shell
Verify the selected theme and currency preference are still applied

title: Load authenticated dashboard overview with KPIs/charts rendered
description: Verifies after sign-in the dashboard overview loads in the app shell and displays KPI/charts content.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Verify dashboard KPI cards are displayed
Verify dashboard charts or trend visuals are displayed

title: Switch modules using side navigation to CRM
description: Verifies an authenticated user can use the side navigation to switch from the dashboard overview to the CRM module.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Click the navigation item for the CRM module
Verify the CRM module view is displayed

title: Search and create a new request and see it in the list
description: Verifies an authenticated ops user can search/filter requests, create a new request with required fields, and see the new request appear in the requests list.

steps.description: Fill a search term into the requests search field
Fill required request details with valid values
Verify the newly created request appears in the requests list

title: Create account and add a sales call and see timeline update
description: Verifies an authenticated sales user can select a property context, create a new account, add a sales call activity, and see the account and its activity reflected in the CRM view.

steps.description: Select a property context in CRM
Start creating a new account record
Fill required account details with valid values
Start adding a sales call activity
Fill required sales call details with valid values
Verify the account shows the newly added activity in its timeline

title: Edit an existing request and see updates reflected
description: Verifies an authenticated ops user can open a request, edit fields including lifecycle status, save, and see the updated request details reflected.

steps.description: Fill required request details with valid values
Open the newly created request details
Edit at least one request field with a valid new value
Change the request lifecycle status to a different valid status
Verify the request details reflect the saved updates

title: Change theme and preferred currency then sign out
description: Verifies a user can change theme and preferred currency in the app shell and then sign out back to landing/login.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Verify the landing page or authentication screen is displayed

title: Update an existing account and see it refreshed in CRM list
description: Verifies an authenticated sales user can open an account, update its details, save, and see the updated information reflected in the account list or details view.

steps.description: Select a property context in CRM
Start creating a new account record
Fill required account details with valid values
Edit at least one account detail with a valid new value
Verify the updated account information is visible in the account details or list

title: Create a new property and see it listed in Settings
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can create a new property with required fields and see it appear in the properties list within Settings.

steps.description: Switch to the properties management section
Fill required property fields with valid values
Verify the new property appears in the properties list

title: Toggle password visibility while entering credentials
description: Verifies the user can toggle password visibility and still submit credentials successfully to reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Click the control to open the authentication screen
Verify the user lands on the authenticated dashboard

title: Filter requests list to narrow results
description: Verifies an authenticated ops user can apply a filter on the requests list and the list updates to show only matching results.

steps.description: Apply an available requests filter with a valid value
Verify the requests list updates to show filtered results

title: Create a new user and see it listed in Settings
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can create a new user with required fields and see the user added to the users list.

steps.description: Switch to the users management section
Fill required user fields with valid values
Verify the new user appears in the users list

title: Delete a user and confirm it is removed from the list
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can delete a user from Settings and the user no longer appears in the users list after confirmation.

steps.description: Switch to the users management section
Fill required user fields with valid values
Initiate deletion for the newly created user
Verify the deleted user no longer appears in the users list

title: Block login when password is missing
description: Verifies submitting the login form with a blank password shows a validation error and does not authenticate the user.

steps.description: Click the control to open the authentication screen
Verify a password-required validation error is visible

title: Open authentication screen from landing page
description: Verifies a public visitor can browse the landing page and reach the authentication screen from the entry route.

steps.description: Scroll through the landing page highlights section
Scroll through the feature cards or screenshots section
Click the control to open the authentication screen
Verify the authentication form is displayed

title: Required-field validation prevents creating a request
description: Verifies an authenticated ops user cannot submit a new request when a required field is missing and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Fill request details while leaving at least one required field blank
Verify a validation error is visible for the missing required field

title: Submit subscription/contact request via mailto handoff
description: Verifies a public visitor can fill the contact form and submit to trigger an email compose handoff or confirmation UX.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact or subscription section
Fill Test Prospect into the name field
Fill prospect@example.com into the email field
Fill a short inquiry message into the message field
Verify a confirmation or email compose handoff is presented

title: Open Calendar module from sidebar
description: After login as Admin, open sidebar and open Calendar; verify calendar or schedule UI is shown.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation using the menu control if the sidebar is hidden
Click the navigation item labeled Calendar
Verify calendar or month/week schedule content is visible

title: Open To Do module from sidebar
description: After login, navigate to To Do management and verify task or to-do UI appears.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Click the navigation item labeled To Do
Verify to-do or task management content is visible

title: Open Events and Catering module
description: After login, open Events & Catering from the sidebar and verify events or catering UI loads.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Click the navigation item for Events & Catering
Verify events or catering workspace content is visible

title: Open Contracts module
description: After login, open Contracts from the sidebar and verify contracts list or workspace appears.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Click the navigation item labeled Contracts

title: Open Accounts module
description: After login, open Accounts from the sidebar and verify accounts list or profile workspace.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Click the navigation item labeled Accounts
Verify accounts or commercial accounts content is visible

title: Open Reports module as Admin
description: User Abdullah is Admin with reports access; open Reports from sidebar and verify reporting UI.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Click the navigation item labeled Reports
Verify reports or analytics content is visible

title: Open Settings and view properties section
description: After login, open Settings and reach properties or configuration management UI.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Click the navigation item labeled Settings
Open the properties or Properties management section if tabs exist
Verify settings management UI with properties or users is visible

title: Return to Dashboard from another module
description: Navigate to CRM then back to Dashboard via sidebar.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Click Sales Calls Management in the sidebar
Open the side navigation again if needed
Verify dashboard overview or KPI content is visible again

title: Use theme switcher on login screen
description: On the login screen, cycle theme control and verify UI still allows login.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page
Click the theme or palette control on the login card if present
Verify authenticated app shell is displayed

title: Browse landing page without logging in
description: Public landing shows marketing content and Subscribe/Login actions.

steps.description: Scroll through the main hero and feature sections
Verify Login and Subscribe or similar calls-to-action are visible

title: Requests module list view only
description: After login, open Requests and verify list or search UI without creating a request.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Open the side navigation if collapsed
Verify requests search, list, or management controls are visible

title: Header shows page title when switching modules
description: After login, switch from Dashboard to Settings and verify header title updates.

steps.description: Click the Login button on the landing page to open the authentication screen
Verify header or title area indicates Settings
